text: AWS Control Tower - Account Factory @ rosimcans, @ s * Automated Account Provisioning e .. cloud admins or end users (with appropriate permissions) * Guardrails - automatically added e Account admin given to a named user (IAM Identity Center) * Account & network standard configuration * Accounts can be closed or repurposed e Can be fully integrated with a businesses SDLC
